name: Bronco
description: The Bronco is a small-scale shotgun that can be wielded with one hand. Only effective at close range, it has a limited Magazine Capacity.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: The Bronco is a small-scale shotgun that can be wielded with one hand. Only effective at close range, it has a limited Magazine Capacity.

components.name: Ferrite
components.description:
Alloy pellets used in Grineer manufacturing.

Location: Mercury, Earth, Lua, Neptune, and the Void

components.name: Neurodes
components.description:
Biotech sensor organ harvested from Infested entities.

Location: Earth, Lua, Eris, and Deimos

components.name: Polymer Bundle
components.description:
A hard, thermoplastic casing. Manufactured by Corpus.

Location: Mercury, Venus, and Uranus

patchlogs.name: Scarlet Spear: TennoGen 27.3.9
patchlogs.changes:
Added a new Lith N4 Relic that contains the Bronco Prime Blueprint.
This was added to address the issue of no Relics containing the Bronco Prime Blueprint.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.3.2
patchlogs.changes:
Restored AkBronco Prime Status Chance back to original 30%.
Increased Bronco Prime Status Chance to 30% to match AkBronco Prime.

patchlogs.name: Update 18: The Second Dream
patchlogs.changes: Brakk, Bronco series, Detron series, Castanas Series and Pyrana are now available for use in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.0.8
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a missing drop icon for the Bronco Prime.

patchlogs.name: Update 12.4.0
patchlogs.additions: ·         Grineer Shipyards tile set revealed with new “Hijack” game mode & Tethra’s Doom event!·         New Prime items in the Void!    Rhino Prime    Ankyros Prime    Boltor Prime    AkBronco Prime·         2x new Alternate helmets (Valkyr, Oberon)·         New Corpus Crewmen voices are here! They now have their own language and a whole new style as voted by the Design Council!

patchlogs.name: Update 7.11.0: Vauban!
